subcodes.first_line: In this day, those souls who have been illumined by the rays of the Sun of Truth and have partaken of the choice wine of the utterance of the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الیوم باید نفوسیکه از انوار آفتاب حقیقت منور شده اند و از رحیق بیان رحمن
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
